basic_details.job_title: KMF SHIMUL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 194 Junior Technician, Assistant Manager and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Shimoga, Davanagere and Chitradurga District Cooperative Milk Producers Unions Federation Ltd. (SHIMUL), Machenahallli, Nidige (Anche), Shimoga – 577 222
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Manager (HRD/Admin), Assistant Manager (Administration), Assistant Manager (F&F), MIS/Systems Officer, Marketing Officer, Technical Officer (Engineering), Technical Officer (Quality Control), Technical Officer (Dairy), Chemist Grade-1, Extension Officer Grade-3, Administrative Assistant Grade-2, Accounts Assistant Grade-2, Marketing Assistant Grade-2, Chemist Grade-2, Senior System Operator, Senior Typist Grade-2, Junior Technician
basic_details.short_information: Shimoga, Davanagere and Chitradurga District Cooperative Milk Producers Unions Federation Ltd. (SHIMUL), Shimoga has published the Revised Recruitment Notification 2026 vide No. SHIMUL/Adaita-1/Ne.Ne-370/1612/2026-27 dated 12-06-2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 194 vacancies across 17 posts including Assistant Manager (HRD/Admin/F&F), MIS/Systems Officer, Marketing Officer, Technical Officer, Chemist, Extension Officer, Administrative Assistant, Accounts Assistant, Marketing Assistant, Senior System Operator, Senior Typist, and Junior Technician posts. Candidates holding relevant educa

application_fee.details: The application fee details are available on the official SHIMUL website www.shimul.coop. Candidates who had paid the application fee for the earlier notifications dated 14.11.2025 and 05.02.2026 can get a refund of the fee to their bank account (after deducting bank charges). Such candidates are informed that they need not submit their applications again by post/courier/speed post – this is clarified explicitly in the notification. | For SC/ST/Cat-I/PWD Candidates: Rs.500/- For All Other Candidates: Rs.1000/-

age_limit.details: Minimum Age Limit: 18 Years Maximum Age limit: 35 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.details: Assistant Manager (AH/AI): B.V.Sc & A.H. Assistant Manager (Administration): MBA. Assistant Manager (F&F): B.Sc. MIS / System Officer: BE/B.Tech. Marketing Officer: B.Com/B.Sc/BBM. Technical Officer (Engineer): BE/B.Tech. Technical Officer (Quality Control): M.Sc. Technical Officer (DT): BE/B.Tech. Chemist Grade-I: B.Sc. Extension Officer Grade-III: Degree. Administrative Assistant Grade-II: Degree. Accounts Assistant Grade-II: B.Com. Marketing Assistant Grade-II: BBM/B.Sc/B.Com. Chemist Grade-II: B.Sc. Junior System Operator: Degree/Diploma. Stenographer Grade-II: Degree. Junior Technician: 10th/SSLC.

selection_process: The selection process details including written test pattern
and other stages are available on the official SHIMUL website www.shimul.coop.
Candidates are advised to visit the official website for complete selection process information before applying online.
how_to_apply: Online submission of application can only be made through the official SHIMUL website at www.shimul.coop. No offline mode of application is available. Interested and eligible candidates must apply online through the SHIMUL website and pay the applicable application fee online only. Candidates are advised to visit the official website for detailed instructions regarding the application process and SOP before filling the form.

Candidates are advised to submit online applications well before the closing date of 14 July 2026 to avoid last-minute technical difficulties. All information regarding reservation category-wise eligibility, documents to be uploaded, and application submission procedure is available on the official SHIMUL website.
important_instructions: Online applications only – no other mode of application will be accepted; candidates cannot submit applications by post/courier/speed post. Candidates must apply online through the official SHIMUL website www.shimul.coop and pay the application fee online only. Detailed information including reservation category, educational qualification, experience, age limit, application fee, application format, required documents, and submission procedure are available on the official website. Candidates who paid the application fee for earlier notifications (dated 14.11.2025 and 05.02.2026) will receive a refund to their bank account after deducting bank charges – they need not apply again by post/courier/speed post. The revised recruitment notification supersedes all previous notifications dated 14.11.2025 and 05.02.2026, as revised by Government Orders dated 27.04.2026 and 08.05.2026. Vacancies are filled based on roster points and one-month reservation calculations as maintained by the Union. All future correspondences regarding the selection process will be published on the official SHIMUL website www.shimul.coop – candidates are responsible for checking the website regularly.

content_sections.heading: SHIMUL Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Shimoga, Davanagere and Chitradurga District Cooperative Milk Producers Unions Federation Ltd. (SHIMUL), headquartered at Machenahallli, Nidige (Anche), Shimoga – 577 222, has officially released a Revised Recruitment Notification vide No. SHIMUL/Adaita-1/Ne.Ne-370/1612/2026-27 dated 12-06-2026, superseding earlier notifications dated 14.11.2025 and 05.02.2026, and revised as per Government Orders dated 27.04.2026 and 08.05.2026. This recruitment is for 194 posts across various cadres available in the Union. Candidates are strongly advised to visit the official website and read the full notification before applying online. Download SHIMUL Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

rows.shimoga_davanagere_and_chitradurga_distr: Assistant Manager (HRD/Admin), Assistant Manager (Administration), Assistant Manager (F&F), MIS/Systems Officer, Marketing Officer, Technical Officer (Engineering), Technical Officer (Quality Control), Technical Officer (Dairy), Chemist Grade-1, Extension Officer Grade-3, Administrative Assistant Grade-2, Accounts Assistant Grade-2, Marketing Assistant Grade-2, Chemist Grade-2, Senior System Operator, Senior Typist Grade-2, Junior Technician

content_sections.heading: SHIMUL Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age Limit: 18 Years Maximum Age limit: 35 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

content_sections.heading: SHIMUL Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 194 vacancies have been announced across 17 posts by SHIMUL for the year 2026-27. The vacancies are filled as per the roster point and one-month reservation calculation maintained by the Union as per Government orders. Reservation details, category-wise vacancy distribution, eligibility, application fee details, application format, required documents, and mode of application are available on the official website www.shimul.coop. Post-wise vacancies are as follows:

content_sections.heading: SHIMUL Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Assistant Manager (AH/AI): B.V.Sc & A.H. Assistant Manager (Administration): MBA. Assistant Manager (F&F): B.Sc. MIS / System Officer: BE/B.Tech. Marketing Officer: B.Com/B.Sc/BBM. Technical Officer (Engineer): BE/B.Tech. Technical Officer (Quality Control): M.Sc. Technical Officer (DT): BE/B.Tech. Chemist Grade-I: B.Sc. Extension Officer Grade-III: Degree. Administrative Assistant Grade-II: Degree. Accounts Assistant Grade-II: B.Com. Marketing Assistant Grade-II: BBM/B.Sc/B.Com. Chemist Grade-II: B.Sc. Junior System Operator: Degree/Diploma. Stenographer Grade-II: Degree. Junior Technician: 10th/SSLC.

content_sections.heading: SHIMUL Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee details are available on the official SHIMUL website www.shimul.coop. Candidates who had paid the application fee for the earlier notifications dated 14.11.2025 and 05.02.2026 can get a refund of the fee to their bank account (after deducting bank charges). Such candidates are informed that they need not submit their applications again by post/courier/speed post – this is clarified explicitly in the notification. For SC/ST/Cat-I/PWD Candidates: Rs.500/- For All Other Candidates: Rs.1000/-

content_sections.heading: SHIMUL Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection process details including written test pattern, interview, and other stages are available on the official SHIMUL website www.shimul.coop. Candidates are advised to visit the official website for complete selection process information before applying online.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for SHIMUL Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Online submission of application can only be made through the official SHIMUL website at www.shimul.coop. No offline mode of application is available. Interested and eligible candidates must apply online through the SHIMUL website and pay the applicable application fee online only. Candidates are advised to visit the official website for detailed instructions regarding the application process and SOP before filling the form. Candidates are advised to submit online applications well before the closing date of 14 July 2026 to avoid last-minute technical difficulties. All information regarding reservation category-wise eligibility, documents to be uploaded, and application submission procedure is available on the official SHIMUL website. Apply Online at: https://virtualofficeerp.com/shimul2026

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for SHIMUL Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: Online applications only – no other mode of application will be accepted; candidates cannot submit applications by post/courier/speed post. Candidates must apply online through the official SHIMUL website www.shimul.coop and pay the application fee online only. Detailed information including reservation category, educational qualification, experience, age limit, application fee, application format, required documents, and submission procedure are available on the official website. Candidates who paid the application fee for earlier notifications (dated 14.11.2025 and 05.02.2026) will receive a refund to their bank account after deducting bank charges – they need not apply again by post/courier/speed post. The revised recruitment notification supersedes all previous notifications dated 14.11.2025 and 05.02.2026, as revised by Government Orders dated 27.04.2026 and 08.05.2026. Vacancies are filled based on roster points and one-month reservation calculations as maintained by the Union. All future correspondences regarding the selection process will be published on the official SHIMUL website www.shimul.coop – candidates are responsible for checking the website regularly.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in SHIMUL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 194 vacancies have been announced by SHIMUL (Shimoga, Davanagere and Chitradurga District Cooperative Milk Producers Unions Federation Ltd.) across 17 posts including Assistant Manager, Technical Officer, Chemist, Extension Officer, Administrative/Accounts/Marketing Assistants, Senior System Operator, Senior Typist, and Junior Technician.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply online for SHIMUL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for SHIMUL Recruitment 2026 is 14 July 2026. The application window opens on 14 June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date to avoid technical issues.

faq.question: Q3. Which organization is conducting SHIMUL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: SHIMUL Recruitment 2026 is being conducted by Shimoga, Davanagere and Chitradurga District Cooperative Milk Producers Unions Federation Ltd. (SHIMUL), headquartered at Machenahallli, Nidige (Anche), Shimoga – 577 222, Karnataka.

faq.question: Q4. What is the pay scale offered in SHIMUL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The pay scale ranges from Rs. 34,100-67,600 (for Junior Technician) to Rs. 83,700-1,55,200 (for Assistant Manager posts), varying as per the post applied for.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for SHIMUL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply only online through the official SHIMUL website at www.shimul.coop. No offline or postal mode of application is accepted. The application fee must also be paid online only through the official website.

faq.question: Q6. Which posts have the highest number of vacancies in SHIMUL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Junior Technician post has the highest number of vacancies with 50 posts, followed by Chemist Grade-2 (28 posts), Assistant Manager HRD/Admin (17 posts), Extension Officer Grade-3 (17 posts), and Administrative Assistant Grade-2 (17 posts).

faq.question: Q7. Is the SHIMUL Recruitment 2026 a revised notification? What changed?
faq.answer: Yes, this is a revised recruitment notification (dated 12-06-2026) superseding earlier notifications dated 14.11.2025 and 05.02.2026. It has been revised in accordance with Government Orders dated 27.04.2026 and 08.05.2026. The total number of vacancies, reservation details, and other conditions have been updated accordingly.

faq.question: Q8. Will candidates who paid the fee for earlier SHIMUL notifications get a refund?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates who had paid the application fee for the earlier notifications dated 14.11.2025 and 05.02.2026 are eligible for a refund to their registered bank account after deducting applicable bank charges. Such candidates are also not required to submit their applications again by post/courier/speed post.

faq.question: Q9. Where are the detailed eligibility criteria and reservation details for SHIMUL Recruitment 2026 published?
faq.answer: Complete details including reservation category-wise vacancy distribution, educational qualifications, experience requirements, age limits, application fee, application format, required documents, and the submission procedure are published on the official SHIMUL website www.shimul.coop as per Karnataka Government Order No. C&B 147 CsBi 2022 dated 12.10.2022.

faq.question: Q10. What is the notification number for SHIMUL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification number for SHIMUL Recruitment 2026 is SHIMUL/Adaita-1/Ne.Ne-370/1612/2026-27, dated 12-06-2026, issued by the Managing Director of SHIMUL, Shimoga.
